case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. vs. DEMOUCHET, DONOVAN

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DEMOUCHET, DONOVAN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-30-1992
CASE TERMINATED: 28-OCT-92 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED
